content.scenarioHint: 游客在购票后想确认支付是否成功，并询问是否收到电子票或纸质票
expectedAnswers: Has my payment gone through successfully?
Could you please confirm if I’ve received my ticket?
Did the system send me an e-ticket, or do I get a physical one?
Can you check if my booking is confirmed after payment?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问支付是否成功及票务状态
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合英语母语者在购票场景中的自然表达
关键词覆盖：使用了 payment, confirmed, ticket, e-ticket 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’ve paid with my phone. Can you check if the booking is confirmed?
content.speakerTextCn: 我用手机支付了，能帮我确认一下预订是否成功吗？
expectedAnswers: Yes, your payment went through. Your tickets are confirmed and sent to your email.
All set! You’re all confirmed — just show your phone at the gate.
Confirmed! You’ll see a digital ticket on your screen — no need for paper.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确告知支付和预订状态
是否使用了现代支付相关词汇（digital ticket, phone, email）
是否提供清晰的下一步指引（如出示手机）
